# C S Fasteners

> MSME-registered industrial screw manufacturer and exporter in Chandigarh, India. Self-tapping, machine, wood, chipboard and fully custom screws. White-label / OEM available; export worldwide on FOB / CIF terms.

## Company
- Name: C S Fasteners
- Location: 136-140/17, Industrial Area, Phase-1, Chandigarh 160002, India
- Type: MSME manufacturer and exporter
- Managing Director: Kuldeep Bansal; Head of Exports: Suryanshu Bansal
- Contact: +91 79738 39379 (sales / WhatsApp)
- Website: https://csfasteners.com

## Products
- Self Tapping Screws (Ø2.9-6.3mm, 9-100mm): https://csfasteners.com/self-tapping-screws
- Machine Screws (M2-M16, 6-200mm, ISO coarse & fine): https://csfasteners.com/machine-screws
- Wood Screws (Ø3-8mm, 12-150mm): https://csfasteners.com/wood-screws
- Chipboard Screws (Ø3-6mm, 15-200mm): https://csfasteners.com/chipboard-screws
- Custom & White-Label Screws (made to drawing / sample): https://csfasteners.com/custom-screws

## Capabilities
- Head styles: Pan, CSK, Raised CSK, Truss, Cheese, Oval, Hex, Hex-Flange, Bugle (9+)
- Drives: Philips, Pozi, Torx, Square, Hex/Allen, slotted
- Finishes: Zinc, Yellow Zinc, Black Oxide, Phosphate, Dacromet, Geo-met, Ruspert, Nickel, Chrome
- Materials: carbon / case-hardened steel, stainless, brass, alloy steel
- White-label / OEM with confidential branded packaging; flexible MOQ; FOB / CIF export worldwide

## Guides
- Screw Finishes Guide: https://csfasteners.com/screw-finishes-guide
- Screw Head Types & Drives: https://csfasteners.com/screw-head-types
- White-Label & OEM Manufacturing: https://csfasteners.com/white-label-screw-manufacturing
- Importing Screws from India: https://csfasteners.com/importing-screws-from-india
